name: EDL-006 New Admin Account Creation
description: EQL sequence: a user account is created (Windows event 4720) and shortly afterwards a member is added to a security-enabled local group (event 4732, e.g. Administrators) by the same subject. Creating an account and immediately granting it admin rights is a hallmark of attacker persistence.
author: elastic-detection-lab
query: sequence by winlog_event_data.SubjectUserName with maxspan=15m [iam where event.code == "4720"] [iam where event.code == "4732"]
false_positives: IT onboarding workflows that create admin accounts programmatically (allowlist the automation's subject account).
